commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional `dreaming.language` memory-core config key, documents it, and attempts to localize Dream Diary narrative prompts and diary date formatting.

PR surface: Source +106, Docs +3. Total +109 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defects from source inspection: the current PR head contains TypeScript-incompatible `undefined` map entries and references `params.language` without declaring it on the narrative params type. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The code blockers are mechanical, but this external feature PR still needs contributor-visible proof and maintainer product/API signoff before a merge path is appropriate.

target.title: feat(dreaming): add language config option for localized dream diaries
